title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Anthropic Beats OpenAI on Secondary Markets With $1 Trillion Implied Valuation
summary: On Forge Global, Anthropic shares are hovering around $1 trillion while OpenAI trades at $880 billion — a reversal nobody saw coming three months ago.

title: Tether freezes $344M USDt stablecoins at US law enforcement request
summary: The stablecoin issuer cited "activity tied to unlawful conduct” but no further explanation for the freezing of the dollar-pegged tokens held in two wallet addresses.

title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5: Faster, Smarter—And Pricier
summary: OpenAI's newest model matches GPT-5.4's speed while outperforming it on nearly every benchmark. It's rolling out to paid ChatGPT users today.

title: OpenAI Says Its New ChatGPT for Doctors Outperforms Humans in Clinical Tasks
summary: ChatGPT for Clinicians is designed to save doctors time, and OpenAI says it scored higher than human physicians—on the AI giant's own test.

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
summary: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

title: Founder of Solana Token Launchpad Believe Arrested on Assault, Strangulation Charges
summary: Benjamin Pasternak faces criminal charges following an investor class action lawsuit and accusations of breaching an OTC token deal.

title: FTX estate misses out on $3B Cursor stake value after $200K sale in 2023
summary: The FTX estate sold its Cursor stake for $200K in 2023, now worth $3B after a SpaceX-linked valuation surge, raising questions about bankruptcy asset sales.

title: Anthropic Using ‘Fear-Based Marketing’ to Promote Claude Mythos: Sam Altman
summary: The OpenAI chief said warnings about rival Anthropic’s AI model may be exaggerated, as its cybersecurity capabilities draw scrutiny.
